_note: Mock research paper metadata records. Abstract text is illustrative only — not real paper abstracts. pdf_url values are placeholders. No PDFs stored in Phase 26b.
_rules: Store abstract and metadata only. Do not download or store PDFs locally unless is_open_access is confirmed.
pdf_url links to the PDF on the original publisher's server, not a local copy.
arxiv_id and openalex_id are for deduplication and cross-referencing only.
license_type must be confirmed before any local PDF storage is approved.
All PDF storage decisions require admin review.

papers.title: Attention Is All You Need
papers.abstract: A sample abstract describing a transformer-based sequence model that uses self-attention mechanisms and achieves strong results on translation benchmarks.

papers.title: A Survey of Deep Learning Techniques for Natural Language Processing
papers.abstract: A sample abstract covering deep learning architectures applied to NLP tasks including classification, named entity recognition, and language modeling.

papers.title: Efficient Algorithms for Sorting and Searching in Large Datasets
papers.abstract: A sample abstract analyzing time and space complexity of comparison-based sorting algorithms and binary search variants for large-scale data.

papers.title: Statistical Foundations of Machine Learning
papers.abstract: A sample abstract covering PAC learning theory, VC dimension, bias-variance tradeoff, and generalization bounds in statistical learning.
